zh.lifeSummary: 當Albrecht II. der Fette von Braunschweig-Wolfenbüttel-Göttinhen於1268年9月18日出生在德國尼德薩辛布勞恩史維時，他的父親Albrecht I. der Große Herzog von Braunschweig-Lüneburg32歲，母親Alessia di Monferrato31歲。他於1284年1月10日與Rixa von Werle結婚。他們至少是9個兒子和4個女兒的父母。他去世於1318年9月22日在德國布勞恩史維布勞恩史維享年50歲，埋葬在德國布勞恩史維布勞恩史維。

variants.name: Vaughan
meanings: Welsh: from fychan, a lenited form of bychan, a diminutive of bach ‘little’. This was often used to distinguish the younger of two bearers of the same personal name, typically the son of a father with the same name.

nameMeanings.name: Albrecht
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.

nameMeanings.name: II.
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Short form of   Violet  ,   Vivien  , or   Vivian .

variants.name: Vivien
meanings: Earlier generally taken as a variant of the boy's name Vivian , but now also rarely used for boys. This spelling was quite common in Old French. Its use as a girl's name in the English-speaking world was influenced by Tennyson's Merlin and Vivien ( 1859 ). This name, from Arthurian legend, may represent an altered form of a Celtic name (perhaps akin to the Irish Gaelic name Béibhinn ‘white lady’, pronounced ‘bee-veen’). The actress Vivien Leigh ( 1913–67 ) was christened Vivian.

variants.name: Violet
meanings: From the name of the flower (Old French violette, Late Latin violetta, a diminutive of viola). This was one of the earliest flower names to become popular in Britain, being used as early as 1700 and becoming well established in the 19th century, although it is now somewhat out of favour.

variants.name: Vivian
meanings: Originally a boy's name, from an Old French form of the Latin name Vivianus (probably a derivative of vivus ‘alive’), but now more frequent as a girl's name. The name was borne by a 5th-century bishop of Saintes in western France, remembered for protecting his people during the invasion of the Visigoths.

meanings: Variant of   Bet  , associated particularly with the film actress  Bette Davis  (  1908–89 ), whose original name was  Ruth Elizabeth Davis .

en.lifeSummary: When Albrecht II. der Fette von Braunschweig-Wolfenbüttel-Göttinhen was born on 18 September 1268, in Brunswick, Lower Saxony, Germany, his father, Albrecht I. der Große Herzog von Braunschweig-Lüneburg, was 32 and his mother, Alessia di Monferrato, was 31. He married Rixa von Werle on 10 January 1284. They were the parents of at least 9 sons and 4 daughters. He died on 22 September 1318, in Brunswick, Brunswick, Germany, at the age of 50, and was buried in Brunswick, Brunswick, Germany.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Albrecht II. der Fette von Braunschweig-Wolfenbüttel-Göttinhen est né le 18 septembre 1268, à Braunschweig, Niedersachsen, Allemagne, son père, Albrecht I. der Große Herzog von Braunschweig-Lüneburg, avait 32 ans et sa mère, Alessia di Monferrato, avait 31 ans. Il a épousé Rixa von Werle le 10 janvier 1284. Ils ont eu au moins 9 fils et 4 filles. Il est décédé le 22 septembre 1318, à Braunschweig, Braunschweig, Allemagne, à l’âge de 50 ans, et a été enterré à Braunschweig, Braunschweig, Allemagne.

de.lifeSummary: Als Albrecht II. der Fette von Braunschweig-Wolfenbüttel-Göttinhen am 18. September 1268 in Braunschweig, Niedersachsen, Deutschland geboren wurde, war sein Vater Albrecht I. der Große Herzog von Braunschweig-Lüneburg 32 und seine Mutter Alessia di Monferrato 31. Er hat am 10. Januar 1284 Rixa von Werle geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 9 Söhne und 4 Töchter. Er starb am 22. September 1318 im Alter von 50 Jahren in Braunschweig, Braunschweig, Deutschland und wurde in Braunschweig, Braunschweig, Deutschland begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Albrecht II. der Fette von Braunschweig-Wolfenbüttel-Göttinhen è nato il il 18 settembre 1268 nel Braunschweig, Niedersachsen, Germania, il suo padre, Albrecht I. der Große Herzog von Braunschweig-Lüneburg, aveva 32 anni e il suo madre, Alessia di Monferrato, aveva 31 anni. Lui sposato Rixa von Werle il 10 gennaio 1284. Erano genitori di almeno 9 figli e 4 figlie. Morì il 22 settembre 1318, nel Braunschweig, Braunschweig, Germania, all'età di 50 anni, e fu sepolto a Braunschweig, Braunschweig, Germania.

ko.lifeSummary: Albrecht II. der Fette von Braunschweig-Wolfenbüttel-Göttinhen(이)가 1268년 9월 18일 독일 니더작센 브라슈위그에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Albrecht I. der Große Herzog von Braunschweig-Lüneburg(은)는 32세였고, 그의 어머니 Alessia di Monferrato(은)는 31세였다. 그는 1284년 1월 10일 Rixa von Werle(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 아홉 명의 아들과 네 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1318년 9월 22일 독일 브라슈위그 브라슈위그에서 50세의 나이로 사망했으며 독일 브라슈위그 브라슈위그에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Albrecht II. der Fette von Braunschweig-Wolfenbüttel-Göttinhen nasceu em 18 de setembro de 1268, em Braunschweig, Niedersachsen, Alemanha, seu pai, Albrecht I. der Große Herzog von Braunschweig-Lüneburg, tinha 32 anos e sua mãe, Alessia di Monferrato, tinha 31 anos. Ele casou-se com Rixa von Werle em 10 de janeiro de 1284. Eles tiveram pelo menos 9 filhos e 4 filhas. Ele faleceu em 22 de setembro de 1318, em Braunschweig, Braunschweig, Alemanha, com 50 anos, e foi sepultado em Braunschweig, Braunschweig, Alemanha.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Albrecht II. der Fette von Braunschweig-Wolfenbüttel-Göttinhen родился 18 сентября 1268 г. в местности браунщвиг, ниедирсачсен, Германия, его отцу по имени Albrecht I. der Große Herzog von Braunschweig-Lüneburg было 32 года, а матери, которую звали Alessia di Monferrato, 31. Он женился на женщине по имени Rixa von Werle 10 января 1284 г. У них было по крайней мере 9 сыновей и 4 дочери. Он умер 22 сентября 1318 г. в местности браунщвиг, браунщвиг, Германия в возрасте 50 лет и был похоронен в местности браунщвиг, браунщвиг, Германия.

Se casó con Rixa von Werle el 10 de enero de 1284. Fueron padres de por lo menos 9 hijos y 4 hijas. Murió el 22 de septiembre de 1318, en Braunschweig, Braunschweig, Alemania, a la edad de 50 años, y fue sepultado en Braunschweig, Braunschweig, Alemania.
